memoryArtifacts.headline: St Bartholomew church
memoryArtifacts.description: St Bartholomew states Sir Thomas may have been buried here or at Boughton with his father. The grey marble slab that held his name at this church has disappeared completely.

zh.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.grene;s norton, northamptonshire, kingdo: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾頓
zh.St. Bartholomew Churchyard, Grene's Nort: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton於1369年2月10日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton24歲，母親Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe25歲。他於1397年與Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1454年登記服兵役。他去世於1417年12月14日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton于1369年2月10日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton24岁，母亲Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe25岁。他于1397年与Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1454年登记服兵役。他去世于1417年12月14日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton was born on 10 February 1369, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton, was 24 and his mother, Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, was 25. He married Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere in 1397, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1454. He died on 14 December 1417, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton est né le 10 février 1369, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere en 1397, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1454. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1417, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton am 10. Februar 1369 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton 24 und seine Mutter Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe 25. Er hat 1397 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1454 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1417 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton è nato il il 10 febbraio 1369 nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere nel 1397, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1454. Morì il 14 dicembre 1417, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.St. Bartholomew Churchyard, Grene's Nort: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Nortonが1369年2月10日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Nortonは24歳，母Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpeは25歳であった。1397年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでLady Mary de Talbot of Blakemereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1454年に兵役登録をした。彼は1417年12月14日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton(이)가 1369년 2월 10일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1397년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1454년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1417년 12월 14일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.10 February 1369–14 December 1417: 10 de fevereiro de 1369–14 de dezembro de 1417
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1369, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere em 1397, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1454. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1417, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton родился 10 февраля 1369 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere в 1397 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1454 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 14 декабря 1417 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.10 February 1369–14 December 1417: 10 de febrero de 1369–14 de diciembre de 1417
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton nació el 10 de febrero de 1369, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Grene I of Grene's Norton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Margery de Mablethorpe of Mablethorpe, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere en 1397, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1454. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1417, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
